policy_note: Canonical source: schedule_config.json for targets/custom rules and trainer_profiles.json for availability/certifications. This file documents location guardrails only; trainer ownership is preference unless saved as a hard custom rule.

hard_constraints.description: 11:00/11:15/11:30/11:45 peak block should be prioritized with Tier 1 trainers where qualified and available
Kwality weekly assignment count must never fall below 70
Strength Lab is allowed only at Kwality and only with certified trainers
Strength/FIT formats should prioritize Atulan, Mrigakshi, Anisha, Reshma, and Richard when qualified and available
Mumbai PowerCycle should prioritize Vivaran, Cauveri, and Karanvir when qualified and available
Do not schedule proven low-performing class/trainer/slot histories unless manually pinned
